books.title: Cuentos que contaban nuestras abuelas (Tales Our Abuelitas Told)
books.author: F. Isabel Campoy & Alma Flor Ada
books.rationale: This book contains a retelling of twelve beloved stories that embody the lively spirit and the rich heritage of Latino people. This Spanish version is used in literature lessons.
books.sharedText:
Upper Spanish: Level 3
Upper Spanish: Level 4
Upper Spanish: Level 5

books.title: Tales Our Abuelitas Told: A Hispanic Folktale Collection
books.author: Alma Flor Ada & F. Isabel Campoy
books.rationale: This is the English translation of the story collection that is used for literature lessons.
books.sharedText:
Upper Spanish: Level 3
Upper Spanish: Level 4
Upper Spanish: Level 5

books.title: The Tree is Older Than You Are: A Bilingual Gathering of Poems & Stories from Mexico with Paintings by Mexican Artists
books.author: Naomi Shihab Nye
books.rationale: Contains poems in Spanish and English to give students deeper insight into the culture.
books.sharedText:
Upper Spanish: Level 1

books.title: Spanish: Level 5 SoundCloud Playlist

books.rationale: Contains audio recordings of the vignette stories.

books.title: Spanish: Level 5 Student Notebook
books.author: Alveary
